issues.sample: I have three issues that I believe compromise the safety of the Hornet. My specific safety-related issues are:            Emergency call system inoperable (this worked originally but became a problem when the       dealer replaced my telematics module)       FCW - Intermittent wa

When in the highway assist, i turn the cruise control on, and every 5 to 10 minutes the highway assist will turn off and i get a code saying Addition Service required. It seems that all new Dodge hornets have this code. ive gone to Dodge Dealers and they all say there is no issue

In cold weather, the driver’s door is either not closing and latching, or it appears like it has closed and then the door flies open while you’re driving. This is dangerous and distracting when it happens (holding the door physically shut while driving at the same time). The deal

narrative.headline: What 2023 Dodge Hornet owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 25 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Forward Collision Avoidance (44% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
